summary: Iteration 11 - Frontend-only testing of the new SignalFlowDiagram component on Print Channel Map. All 8 acceptance scenarios verified end-to-end via Playwright: diagram presence above outputs table, empty-state placeholder, three-column SVG structure (INPUTS/DSP CHAIN/OUTPUTS), DSP chain labels, per-route path testids, dynamic update on route changes, description rendering inline in SVG, and legend counts. All print modal regression checks pass with zero console/page errors.
verified_scenarios: Print modal opens and signal-flow-diagram appears ABOVE print-outputs-table (diagram top=221px < table top=564px).
Three column headers rendered in SVG: INPUTS (blue), DSP CHAIN (black), OUTPUTS (orange).
Central DSP block lists all 5 labels: 'EQ · 5 BANDS', 'CROSSOVER', 'COMP / LIM', 'DELAY', 'PAN · GAIN'.
Initial routes drawn with correct testids: flow-route-in_phy_0-out_phy_0, flow-route-in_phy_1-out_phy_1 (2 routes match default matrix).

After Matrix → Clear All Routes: signal-flow-diagram is removed and signal-flow-empty shows placeholder text 'Signal Flow Diagram — no active routing. Configure routes in the Matrix tab to populate this view.'
Adding route in_phy_5→out_phy_10 (and in_phy_0→out_phy_0) reflects in the diagram with matching flow-route-in_phy_5-out_phy_10 testid.
Setting sel-channel-description='Lead Vocal' for OUT 1 renders inline italic text in SVG: 'OUT 1  · Lead Vocal'.
Legend text: 'Showing 2 active inputs → 2 active outputs via 2 routes. Unrouted channels are omitted for clarity.' (correct pluralization and counts).
Regression: print-modal opens, print-trigger and print-close are visible/enabled, outputs table renders below the diagram, zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: legend container is selected via class '.text-[9px]' in tests; consider adding a dedicated data-testid like 'signal-flow-legend' for easier programmatic verification in future regressions.
Minor: SVG viewBox width is fixed at 720 and preserveAspectRatio scales to container width — works fine on the print modal width but on very narrow viewports text could become tight. Not blocking.

Suggestion: when a description exceeds 20 chars the diagram truncates with an ellipsis; this is sensible for print but consider exposing the full description via an SVG <title> for hover/accessibility.
seed_data_creation: Used in-memory dsp store. Modified routes via Matrix tab (clear + add) and set OUT 1 description to 'Lead Vocal' during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SignalFlowDiagram is a render-time visualization of state.matrix shown above the print outputs table. testids: signal-flow-diagram, signal-flow-empty, flow-route-{inId}-{outId}. Empty state appears when no routes exist; diagram is hidden in that case. The diagram updates reactively when matrix or descriptions change.
